title: Questions to ask Anno about NGE once NME is over
display_title: Questions to ask Anno about NGE once NME is over
wikitext:
[]: Questions to ask Anno about NGE once NME is over Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 9:02 pm My original idea was to just have one thread with questions about NGE and NME. But as Reichu et. al. pointed out, that would get messy pretty darn quickly. So this thread is specifically for questions about the original series, Death & Rebirth and/or End of Evangelion that you would like some eventual Word of God on. My question to start off this thread: Can you please explain the mystery Reiquarium images?

[]: I may look teally stupid for posting this Post by Rj123541 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 9:13 pm Exactly what is NME?

[]: Post by Blue Monday » Mon Aug 27, 2012 9:14 pm Pretty sure he's already answered that... In his own way: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Statements_by_Evangelion_Staff#Hideaki_Anno:_Statement_about_New_Evangelion_Movies Besides that, this is an NGE thread.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 9:23 pm Questions about NME/Rebuild go here .

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 28, 2012 1:08 am "Will it ever be 'all over'?" (at least in Anno's lifetime)

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Aug 28, 2012 1:13 am Mr. Tines wrote: "Will it ever be 'all over'?" (at least in Anno's lifetime)

[]: Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Aug 28, 2012 1:19 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Isn't "NGE" technically over? This thread's title is a little weird.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Aug 28, 2012 1:43 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: My thoughts exactly. Perhaps it refers to NME?

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Aug 28, 2012 8:34 am Yeah, I wasn't sure how to title it since there's a character limit. Changed it, should be more clear now.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 28, 2012 10:36 am Hate to do this again, but there's already a perfectly fine "Ask Anno" thread in Chit-Chat. Don't make a new thread when you can just bump.
